headlines.headline: Ixenis Outlets delays product launch in renewable storage segment

sentiment.reasoning: Delaying a product launch typically results in deferred revenue and potential loss of market momentum.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
